sections.paragraph:
verb לעמוד

to stand, stand up; rise; be erect; stand still, halt, stop, cease; insist on, demand; remain, stay; withstand, endure; pass; succeed; intend to, be about to; be nominated; realize; keep (a promise)

verb להיעמד

to stand up; stand still, stop, halt

verb לעמד

to page, paginate

verb להעמיד

to cause to stand; erect, set up; appoint, nominate; put to; produce, beget

verb הועמד

be caused to stand; erected, set up; be appointed, nominated; put to

verb לעמד (>>עימד)

to page, paginate
